subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thy letter was received and from its contents the utmost joy and fragrance became evident. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه ات رسید و از مضمون نهایت روح و ریحان معلوم گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
